refined_caption: Trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing with waste. The surrounding area appears to be littered with debris.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital in a rural area and was appalled to see the trash bins outside overflowing with garbage. The smell was unbearable and it's a health hazard. The hospital should take immediate action to clean up the area.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are totally overflowing, it's really gross and smells terrible.
